basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Gorakhpur Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 12 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Gorakhpur
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Gorakhpur (AIIMS Gorakhpur) Junior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on 30 May 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Gorakhpur. A total of 12 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Gorakhpur Junior Resident Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 37 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST up to 5 years, OBC up to 3 years, PwBD up to 10 years (General), 13 years (OBC), 15 years (SC/ST)

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS from MCI recognized institute with completed compulsory rotatory internship
qualification.details: MBBS from MCI recognized institute. Candidate must have completed compulsory rotatory internship and must produce an internship completion certificate.

salary_details.details: In Pay Matrix (Level-10) with a minimum of Rs.56,100/- + NPA (for medical personnel) as per recommendations of the 7th CPC.
